name: Alucard Tepes | Heat 🌡️
description:
When Alucard locks himself in his room for days, you can't help but wonder how you can help.

Another request! I would like to give credit to a Tumblr post by yanderepuck, as the post is where I got some ideas for the heat. If you have anymore requests, you can submit them here!
